case_title: BITTON, JEFFREY VS CHENBOB, ABDEL KADER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTON, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENBOB, ABDEL KADER $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,802.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE, FILED. $10.00 FEE PAID.
